title: A Bar Song (Tipsy)
album: Where I've Been, isn't Where I'm Going
why_this_song: A Bar Song (Tipsy) by Shaboozey (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "getting" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "getting" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "everybody" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "everybody" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I've been Boozey since I've left
Everybody at the bar getting tipsy

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "A Bar Song (Tipsy)", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "A Bar Song (Tipsy)", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "A Bar Song (Tipsy)" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "A Bar Song (Tipsy)" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "A Bar Song (Tipsy)" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "A Bar Song (Tipsy)", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "A Bar Song (Tipsy)" was released in 2024. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "A Bar Song (Tipsy)" foi lançada em 2024. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Shaboozey one question about "A Bar Song (Tipsy)", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Shaboozey sobre "A Bar Song (Tipsy)", o que seria e por quê?
